policy.large_asset_note: Sticker, audio, video, and multi-GB archives are not downloaded in this phase to avoid VPN traffic. Keep download URLs and instructions only.
policy.usage_rule: Use public sources to distill behavior patterns, multimodal decision rules, and evaluation cases. Do not copy public samples verbatim into product prompts or generated replies.
policy.privacy_rule: Do not use leaked private chat logs, private WeChat records, or materials that identify private people without consent.
policy.commercial_caution: Sources with non-commercial, research-only, or unclear terms should be used for analysis and prototype evaluation only unless later licensing review approves product use.

sources.name: CPED
risks: Dataset content should be transformed into abstract rules or filtered examples, not copied into final product replies.

sources.name: CDial-GPT / LCCC
risks: Large dataset; original source mixture includes social-media style text and needs quality filtering.
Some emoji and noisy content may have been filtered by the original project, so it is weaker for sticker behavior.

sources.name: Emotional-Support-Conversation / ESConv
risks: English dataset; useful for support strategy, less direct for Chinese voice.
Repository states data and code are for academic research use only, so use it for strategy reference and evaluation design, not product training.

sources.name: SoulChat / SoulChatCorpus
sources.license: Apache-2.0 for repository; model use may be non-commercial because of base-model terms
risks: Mental-health data requires extra safety review.
The project notes non-commercial restrictions for model weights; avoid using model outputs or weights in product without legal review.

sources.name: EmotionTalk
risks: Non-commercial and share-alike license; use as research reference only unless product licensing is clarified.
Audio/video assets are larger and should not be downloaded during VPN-saving phase.

sources.name: U-Sticker
risks: Sticker archive is very large and should be downloaded only after VPN is off.
Sticker media may carry additional copyright risk; prefer using source only to learn trigger rules, then generate or license our own sticker pack.

sources.name: StickerConv
risks: Use stickers as behavior examples, not as final product assets unless asset rights are checked.

sources.name: StickerInt / Int-RA
sources.license: paper_reference; code/data license should be checked at repository before use
risks: Use the architecture idea and evaluation design; do not assume data assets are product-cleared.

sources.name: LiveChat
risks: Live-stream style may be too public and performative for private late-night companionship.
Needs filtering to avoid streamer-specific catchphrases and platform slang overfitting.

sources.name: LLM Roleplay
risks: Use method ideas; do not depend on gated model APIs or unreviewed generated datasets for product training.

sources.name: Character-LLM / trainable-agents
sources.license: Apache-2.0 repository; academic/non-commercial restrictions noted by authors for resources
recommended_use: protective scenes for reducing character hallucination
risks: The project notes academic research restrictions for resources; use as method inspiration, not product asset source.

sources.name: OpenPersona
risks: Do not adopt framework internals before architecture review.

sources.name: awesome-persona-distill-skills
recommended_use: style and interaction pattern extraction ideas
risks: Use as inspiration for distillation workflow, not as a source for copying private-persona templates.
